fix: remove VPC egress, restore project-number API URL

VPC Direct Egress (ALL_TRAFFIC) requires Cloud NAT to reach public IPs.
Without Cloud NAT the subnet has no internet egress path, causing TCP
timeout when the nginx BFF connects to the API's *.run.app endpoint.

Also reverts api_url back to the project-number URL format:
data.google_cloud_run_v2_service.api.uri returns the hash-based v1 URL
(osrs-api-HASH-uc.a.run.app) which resolves to a different IP than the
confirmed-working project-number URL (osrs-api-NUMBER.REGION.run.app).

Security: INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALL + Cloud Run IAM (OIDC token required from
osrs-ui-sa). IAM auth is enforced at the Cloud Run load balancer before
the container is invoked — unauthenticated external requests get 403
without spinning up the container.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve bugs from comprehensive bug hunting session

- Fix fan chart stacking: use proper band rendering with stackId instead
  of white overlay areas that obscured colored bands
- Fix touch probability off-by-one: check path[0] (starting price) against
  target so below-current targets correctly show ~100% touch probability
- Fix findOptimalTarget/percentiles empty array guard
- Add NaN/Infinity validation to fitGaussianHmm model parameters
- Guard bondCouponEndValue against couponFrequency=0 division by zero
- Guard KantorSidebar spreadPct against division by zero
- Guard VerdictBanner against empty results array
- Debounce sell analysis horizon changes (300ms) to avoid recomputing
  10K Monte Carlo paths on every slider tick
- Fix useRef initial value for React 19 compatibility
- Custom fan chart tooltip showing all percentile values

commit.message:
feat: comprehensive security system with OTP signup

Backend:
- Add users table with OTP/session token fields
- Add userId column to documents for data isolation
- New auth routes: request-otp, verify-otp, session, logout
- Session token auth (Bearer token from OTP verification)
- Lock API key to fixed admin identity (no impersonation)
- Filter ALL document queries by userId (ownership checks)
- Claude artifacts/edit/prompt endpoints respect ownership
- Legacy docs (userId IS NULL) remain accessible during migration
- CORS locked to explicit origins in production
- MCP auth required in production (no silent skip)
- D1 migration: 0002_security_users.sql

Mobile:
- 2-step OTP login flow (email → 6-digit code → session)
- Session token stored in SecureStore (mobile) / localStorage (web)
- API client uses Bearer token auth (falls back to API key)
- Auto-fill OTP in development mode
- Countdown timer, resend, error states

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: PWA support

Framesnap can now be installed as a native-like app on desktop and mobile.

- Add @vite-pwa/nuxt with Workbox service worker (autoUpdate mode)
- Web app manifest: name, theme_color #0f172a, display standalone
- Icons generated with @vite-pwa/assets-generator from framesnap.svg:
  pwa-64x64.png, pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png,
  maskable-icon-512x512.png, apple-touch-icon-180x180.png, favicon.ico
- Caching strategy:
  - /_nuxt/* assets: CacheFirst (content-hashed, 1yr)
  - /api/thumbnails|frame: StaleWhileRevalidate
  - /api/upload|export|stream: NetworkOnly
- nginx: Cache-Control no-store for sw.js so updates are instant
- README: PWA install instructions table + HTTPS note

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: remove wasm-wit-doc crate, use wit-parser directly in wasm-frontend

Moves the WIT document model types and conversion logic from the
standalone `wasm-wit-doc` crate into an internal `wit_doc` module
within `wasm-frontend`. This eliminates the separate crate while
keeping the same document-model boundary.

- Removed `crates/wasm-wit-doc` crate and workspace references
- Added `wit_doc` module to `wasm-frontend` with types.rs and convert.rs
- Updated all frontend page imports to use `crate::wit_doc`
- Changed type visibility from `pub` to `pub(crate)` since they're now internal

fix: prevent HMR crash with better-sqlite3 on Windows

Add explicit webpack externals for better-sqlite3 to prevent
.next/middleware-manifest.json from being deleted during hot
module replacement. The native module was causing webpack to
corrupt the build cache on file changes.

Fix browser caching of streams - use API endpoint with no-store header

cache aggressively. Switch to /api/streams with a cache-busting timestamp
and Cache-Control: no-store so every refresh gets the latest stream list.

commit.message:
feat: 棱镜（Prism）v0.1 — 多视角协同分析引擎

新增 prism/ 子系统，将多 Agent 协同分析能力正式化为可复用的标准流程：

架构
- 双协议族：独立取样型（explore/redteam/test）和议事型（council）
- 6 步独立取样协议：Frame → Dispatch(Firewall) → Collect(quorum) → Synthesize → Adjudicate → Archive
- 议事协议：N 轮收敛，共享前轮摘要，70% 阈值终止

关键设计决策（基于两轮 rubber-duck 评审）
- Dispatch Firewall：执行阶段 Agent 不得读取 reports/ 或他人中间产出
- 超时治理：30min 超时，1次重试，60% quorum
- Adjudicate 裁决：consensus/weak/deadlock/escalate 四档，deadlock 强制暂停等人类决策
- 记忆接入：采纳的结论沉淀至 knowledge/lessons.md（复活协议必读文件）
- 报告永久 git 追踪，index.yaml 结构化索引
- 触发条件改为风险信号驱动（不再用文件数量）
- §10 PM Gate 权威：Prism 无权推翻已锁定需求，冲突时 escalate

文件
- prism/README.md：概览和快速参考
- prism/protocol.md：完整协议（双协议族 + 触发条件 + 迁移矩阵 + index schema）
- prism/modes/：explore/redteam/test 各模式说明
- prism/roles/README.md：角色分配指南
- prism/reports/index.yaml：报告索引（初始为空）
- CONTRIBUTING.md §11：棱镜集成指南（§8/§9 保留，Prism 为系统化路径）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Revert Newtonsoft.Json dependency tracking (#15596) (#15651)

Reverts the assembly resolution tracking and warning mechanism for
Newtonsoft.Json that was added in #15596. Investigation showed that:

- vstest's AssemblyResolver.OnResolve never fires for Newtonsoft.Json
  because it is loaded via normal CLR probing before the event triggers
- On .NET Framework, MSTest has its own AssemblyResolver in a separate
  AppDomain that resolves NJ independently from vstest's resolver
- The ProvidedDependencies telemetry was always empty in practice
- No feasible proactive warning mechanism exists for this scenario

The [DoNotParallelize] test fixes from the same PR are preserved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Direct VPC Egress so UI can reach internal-only API

Without VPC egress, Cloud Run-to-Cloud Run requests in the same project
are routed through the public internet and rejected as external traffic
by INGRESS_TRAFFIC_INTERNAL_ONLY (404).

Adding Direct VPC Egress with egress=ALL_TRAFFIC routes the UI container's
outbound requests through the project's default VPC.  Cloud Run then
recognises those requests as intra-VPC (internal) traffic, satisfying the
API's ingress restriction without a Serverless VPC Access Connector.

ALL_TRAFFIC (not PRIVATE_RANGES_ONLY) is required because the API's
*.run.app hostname resolves to a public IP; only ALL_TRAFFIC sends that
through the VPC path so Cloud Run treats it as internal.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Comprehensive audit fixes: XSS sanitization, CSP, API retry, backend hardening

Frontend:
- Add DOMPurify XSS sanitization for dangerouslySetInnerHTML (vehicle desc, blog posts)
- Add Content-Security-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, Permissions-Policy headers
- Add Forge backend hostname to next/image remotePatterns
- Add API retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures
- Fix hardcoded German in global-error.tsx (bilingual DE/EN fallback)
- Fix hardcoded German aria-labels on gallery zoom buttons (use translations)
- Add zoomIn/zoomOut translation keys to all 24 locale files

Backend:
- Cap blog per_page to max 50 (prevent DoS)
- Cache company settings (1 hour) and vehicle brands (5 min)
- Escape search wildcards to prevent wildcard injection
- Strengthen payment reference generation (Str::random(16) vs md5)
- Reduce reservation show rate limit (30/min -> 10/min)

fix: ensure vuln files are cached and re-extracted when missing

Two fixes to ensure per-arch vulnerability JSON files are always
available for the dashboard links:

   container images - force re-extraction when:

commit.message:
fix(vip): increase default inter_conv_gap to 400ns for 2-context MPTDC

The MPTDC has N_CTX=2 contexts. With the old 50ns gap, a 3rd conversion
arrives while both contexts are still measuring, causing the async frontend
to reject it (any_ctx_free=0). 400ns ensures at least one context frees
before the next conversion starts.

Also adds optional gap_ps parameter to gen_tdc_conversions for tests
that need explicit control.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: rate limit only /api/upload, not all /api/* endpoints

The rate limiter was applied to all /api/* routes including /api/stream.
The video player makes many HTTP 206 range requests to buffer the video,
which immediately exhausted the burst limit (5) and returned 503 —
causing 'nothing loaded' in the editor after upload.

Fix: move limit_req to a dedicated /api/upload location block.
All other /api/* routes (stream, thumbnails, frame, export) are unrestricted.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Optimal Sell Price Analysis — HMM Monte Carlo with full path tracking

New feature accessible via tab toggle when stock data is loaded:
- 10,000 GBM paths with HMM regime switching (reuses existing HMM infra)
- Fan chart (p10-p90 bands) showing price envelope over time
- Touch probability curve — P(reaching target) vs price level
- Summary table with Target | P(touch) | Expected Value | PLN equiv
- Optimal target: maximizes E(sell) = P(touch)×target + (1-P(touch))×median
- Summary cards: optimal price, P(hit), expected value, downside risk
- Horizon presets: 21d / 63d / 126d / 252d

Architecture:
- SellAnalysisPanel lazy-loaded (separate 24KB chunk)
- Pure calc functions in src/utils/sellAnalysis.ts
- Hook src/hooks/useSellAnalysis.ts (only runs when tab active)
- Types in src/types/sellAnalysis.ts
- Exported mulberry32/boxMuller from hmm.ts for reuse

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(vip): settle delay after TDC events + correct word-count prediction

spadmic_driver: add 500 ns/conversion settle delay after inject_tdc_events()
to prevent a subsequent disable-CTRL from catching a transient path_idle
window between back-to-back MPTDC packets.

spadmic_tdc_ref_model: fix words_per_hit to match actual MPTDC v2.3 packet
format — RAW_FEATURES=3, RAW_TIMESTAMP=2, FULL=4 — and update the formula
base from 2+1 to 3 (header + subheader + EOC). Eliminates the spurious
'word count 48 != predicted 18' warnings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Versus section for model-to-model comparison (#302)

* feat: add Versus section for model-to-model comparison

Adds a new "Versus" feature where users compare AI-generated apps built
from the same prompt by different LLMs. Includes listing page, head-to-head
comparison page with side-by-side entries, pick-the-winner voting, and a
script-driven data pipeline for easy maintenance.

feat: add interactive chat command for multi-turn conversations

Add `orcastrator chat` command that launches an interactive REPL where
users can have continuous back-and-forth conversations with their agent
team. Features:

- Multi-turn context: conversation history is prepended to each message
  so agents maintain context across turns
- Auto-routing: messages are routed to the best agent automatically
- Agent lock: use `-a <name>` flag or `/agent <name>` to lock to a
  specific agent
- Slash commands: /help, /exit, /clear, /history, /agent, /auto
- Graceful shutdown on Ctrl+C or Ctrl+D

New files:
- src/cli/chat.ts — interactive readline-based chat REPL
- src/core/chat-session.ts — ChatSession class that keeps agent sessions
  alive across turns with bounded history window

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: change default Docker port from 80 to 8090

Port 80 often requires elevated privileges or is already in use.
8090 is a safer default that works without sudo on all platforms.

Users can still override with FRAMESNAP_PORT=80 in their .env.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: framesnap
repository.description: Browser-based app to extract high-quality PNG frames from videos. Upload a video, scrub through the timeline, set markers, and export them as a ZIP of PNGs. Run it locally or self-host it anywhere you like.
